rows.label: tev021902_MSG0001
rows.name:
Do you know Latte? She's one of
my baristas, and she's been
acting a little strange lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021902_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's been that way ever since I put her
in charge of our brand-new espresso machine.
Don't tell me she... Oh, not AGAIN![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021902_MSG0003
rows.name:
Look, I know she wouldn't say anything to me about
it, so can you talk to her instead? Figure out what's
up, and your next drink will be on the house![ST:wait ]
